title: Census data on the Atlanta MSA in 2020 — atlanta
text: dataset containing U.S. census data Atlanta MSA 2020 "tract" level. Atlanta MSA, publication, comprised five counties: Fulton, DeKalb, Cobb, Gwinnett, Clayton. Census Bureau publishes margin error ("moe") estimate, dataset includes point estimate. Data retrieved U.S. Census Bureau's API using `tidycensus` package.

Eastbound westbound trips treated differently eastbound passages assisted Gulf Stream favorable weather systems. significance Blue Riband dataset documents evolution sail steam diesel.
